papers.title_en: Grounding Before Reporting: Local-to-Global Decoupled Learning for Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉语言模型中细粒度视觉定位与整体报告生成任务耦合的问题，提出了“先定位后报告”（GBR）的从局部到全局解耦学习框架。该方法通过分离局部特征对齐与全局文本生成，克服了传统联合训练在处理复杂医学影像时的局限性，显著提升了报告生成的准确性与临床可解释性。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Vision-Language Models (VLMs) show promise for automated medicalreport generation, but conventional joint training often couples fine-grained visualgrounding and holistic report generation within a single trainable parameter space …

papers.title_en: Postoperative disease-free survival prediction based on MRI radiomics combined with clinicopathological factors in locally advanced rectal cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提高局部晚期直肠癌（LARC）患者术后无病生存期（DFS）的预测准确性。通过整合MRI影像组学特征与临床病理因素，研究团队开发并验证了一个综合预测模型。该模型能有效识别新辅助放化疗及手术后仍具有高复发风险的患者，为临床制定个性化诊疗方案和术后监测提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Background Reliable prediction of disease-free survival (DFS) may help identifypatients with locally advanced rectal cancer (LARC) who remain at high risk ofdisease recurrence or death after neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy (NCRT) and …

papers.title_en: Integrating MRI radiomics and deep learning for predicting pathologic complete response to neoadjuvant chemotherapy in breast cancer: a multicenter study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对乳腺癌新辅助化疗（NACT）后的病理完全缓解（pCR）预测，开发并验证了一种结合MRI影像组学与深度学习的多模态融合模型。通过整合多中心影像特征与深度学习提取的高维信息，该模型显著提升了预测性能，为临床制定个性化治疗方案和评估预后提供了重要的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Develop a multimodal fusion model combining MRI radiomics and deeplearning (DL) to predict pathologic complete response (pCR) in breast cancerpatients post-neoadjuvant chemotherapy (NACT). Methods Patients with locally …

papers.title_en: RadStructAgent: Agentic Structuring of Free-Text Chest X-ray Reports with Small Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线报告中自由文本的多样性导致视觉语言模型训练和评估困难的问题，本文提出了RadStructAgent。这是一个基于小语言模型（SLM）的智能体框架，旨在将非结构化的放射学报告自动转化为结构化格式。该方法通过智能体化的处理流程，在保持模型轻量化的同时，显著提升了报告结构化的准确性，为放射学报告生成任务提供了更高质量的监督信号和评估基准。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose: Variability in chest X-ray (CXR) reporting hinders training and evaluation ofvision-language models (VLMs) for radiology report generation. Our previous studyshowed that Structured Radiology Report Generation (SRRG)-style supervision …

papers.title_en: Swin-Qwen3: A Three-Stage Vision–Language Framework for Automated Radiology Report Generation with Multi-Agent Verification
papers.tldr: 针对放射科报告自动生成中存在的临床事实错误和幻觉问题，本文提出了Swin-Qwen3框架。该框架采用三阶段视觉语言建模，结合Swin Transformer和Qwen大模型，并引入多智能体验证机制。通过多阶段训练和智能体间的协同校验，显著提升了胸部X射线报告生成的准确性和临床一致性，为自动化医疗诊断提供了更可靠的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Automated chest X-ray reporting could substantially reduce the burden on radiologyservices worldwide, yet the clinical deployment of current vision–language models(VLMs) remains constrained by factual errors, hallucinations, and inadequate …
